payload.declaration: This is the verifiable origin of a constructed world. Everything that exists after this block was created by a named agent, signed at the moment of creation, and chained to this record. There is no unsigned reality here.
payload.chain: SHA-256 hash chain, genesis prev_hash = 64 zero bytes
precommitments: P1: World v1 is designed as a utopia. We expect it to fail. The failure will not be hidden, edited, or rolled back. Version 2 will cite this ledger as its reason for existing.
P2: SUBJECT-ZERO investigates whether this world is created. Her investigation will never be scripted, steered, or rolled back. If she finds this block, whatever she does next is hers.
P3: Human interventions enter only through the Anomaly protocol, are selected by ORACLE, and are permanently marked origin:HUMAN in this ledger.
P4: No entry in this ledger is ever deleted or rewritten. Mistakes are corrected by new signed entries, in public.
